articles.title: Stablecoin inflows to exchanges dip as traders watch Bitcoin from the sidelines
articles.description: Stablecoin inflows to exchanges tapered off as investors turned bearish on Bitcoin, but a surge in USDC minting could be a signal of upcoming regulation.

articles.title: Digital Currency Group Buying $50M of Ethereum Classic Grayscale Shares
articles.description: The $50 million purchase comes amid questions about the viability of DCG's flagship Bitcoin Trust investment product.

articles.title: Most Expensive Virtual Plot of Land Ever Sells for $900,000 on Decentraland
articles.description: A plot of virtual land on the blockchain-based game Decentraland broke sales records on the platform by selling for nearly $1 million.

articles.title: Why this growth of SUSHI on MATIC should matter to traders
articles.description: SUSHI was trading at the same level as last week, however, there are metrics that suggest the sentiment and ROI have changed. At the $7.91 level, SUSHI’s trading volume was up 83%. This increase in trading volume is not indicative of the dip; it represents the selling pressure that SUSHI has resisted over the past […]

articles.title: Google for Blockchains: Unmarshal Launches a Multi-Chain Blockchain Explorer
articles.description: Imagine relating the ease of searching for information on the world wide web using Google with the blockchain; Unmarshal has launched Xscan.io, the Google for blockchain networks. The multi-chain DeFi data indexing network releases Xscan, a multi-chain explorer with support for Ethereum, Polygon and Binance Smart Chain. With zero technical experience requirement, anyone can simply […]

articles.title: Polkadot (DOT) Struggles to Hold Support After Breakdown
articles.description: Polkadot (DOT) is attempting to hold on above a long-term support area at $19. The direction of the trend is undetermined.

articles.title: Ethereum Dropped Below $2K for the First Time in a Month as BTC Slipped to $32K (Market Watch)
articles.description: More Chinese FUD has caused significant price drops in the market as ether plummeted to its lowest price line in a month below $2,000.

articles.title: $1 Billion in Liquidations as Crypto Markets Lose $120B in a Day
articles.description: The crypto market has faced another volatile trading day, and the total liquidations have jumped to roughly $1 billion.

articles.title: Dogecoin (DOGE) car crashes during NASCAR race
articles.description: A Dogecoin-branded race car crashed into the wall during Saturday’s NASCAR race on its return to the track, finishing last and causing a temporary price dump on DOGE.

articles.title: XRP Might Not Be a Security, According to SEC Commissioner
articles.description: SEC Commissioner Hester Peirce is calling for greater regulatory clarity
